# fleetdm_reports (Data Source)

Use this data source to retrieve information about all FleetDM reports.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Get all reports
data "fleetdm_reports" "all" {}

# Output all report names
output "all_report_names" {
  value = [for report in data.fleetdm_reports.all.reports : report.name]
}

# Get reports for a specific fleet
data "fleetdm_reports" "fleet_reports" {
  fleet_id = fleetdm_fleet.workstations.id
}

# Find scheduled reports
output "scheduled_reports" {
  value = [for report in data.fleetdm_reports.all.reports : report.name if report.interval > 0]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `fleet_id` (Number) Filter reports by fleet ID. If not specified, all global reports are returned.

### Read-Only

- `reports` (Attributes List) List of reports. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--reports))

<a id="nestedatt--reports"></a>
### Nested Schema for `reports`

Read-Only:

- `author_email` (String) The email of the user who created the report.
- `author_id` (Number) The ID of the user who created the report.
- `author_name` (String) The name of the user who created the report.
- `automations_enabled` (Boolean) Whether automations are enabled.
- `description` (String) A description of the report.
- `discard_data` (Boolean) Whether to discard report results after logging.
- `fleet_id` (Number) The ID of the fleet this report belongs to.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the report.
- `interval` (Number) The scheduled report interval in seconds.
- `logging` (String) The logging type for this report.
- `min_osquery_version` (String) The minimum osquery version required.
- `name` (String) The name of the report.
- `observer_can_run` (Boolean) Whether observers can run this report.
- `platform` (List of String) List of platforms this report is compatible with (darwin, linux, windows, chrome). Empty list means all platforms.
- `query` (String) The SQL query.
